metadata.description: Canopy — skills as executable code. Installable as a Claude Code plugin. Bundles runtime engine + authoring agent + trace wrapper.

plugins.name: canopy
plugins.description: Canopy framework — three bundled skills: canopy-runtime (execution engine; interprets canopy-flavored skills), canopy (authoring agent), canopy-debug (trace wrapper). Install canopy-runtime alone to execute existing canopy skills; add canopy to create/edit/manage them.
